name: GET /api/leads - List captured leads for the admin lead inbox
description: Operator-facing endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Inbox. Returns every captured lead in creation-time order so presales can triage what just landed. Cursor pagination + server-side filtering arrives in later phases (P2).
skipReason: lead-service runs on its own port (4011 per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP) but the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: List captured leads after at least one /api/leads POST has landed
